item.title: Feel old yet?
item.description:
Fun fact: I got to see Trent Reznor and David Bowie do this song together at the shoreline amphitheater years ago. I'm so glad I kept all of my old concert tickets.
**viral edit** hey thanks guys for helping me relive a really cool moment in my life. The world is missing a legend that is David Bowie. My wish? To end all animal abuse. I saw how everybody was upset the other day about that horse that was rescued from the Amish. That's the same hellscape that all animals go through on farms. my wish? Like my name implies, be kind to all kinds <3 Please watch Earthlings and Dominion https://www.filmsforaction.org/watch/earthlings/ https://watchdominion.org/
item.dc:creator: CJwhoIsKindToAllKinds

item.title: I'm in this picture and I'm proud of it.
item.description: Subtracted the Jesus part some years ago, works fine without him.
item.dc:creator: cannibalthemusical

item.title: X-men's Rogue Cosplay - Carnival Version!
item.description:
C2e2 Cosplay Exhibit as Rogue from X-men [Carnival Version] This was my first time walking during the Cosplay Exhibit, and it was such a fun time!! My friend Panterona Cosplay designed these cool variations of Carnival x-men, and I decided to go with Rogue! See more: @mjasmine.design @panteronacosplay
Cosplay vs character ! Pic by: King of Nolita
Look at all the details !! I followed tutorials on how to make Carnival backpacks and used different techniques to make the bodysuit and attach all the gems and crystals Most of them were attached by hand because of how thick they were, and I didn't want to damage my sewing machines I also 3D printed and painted some pieces like the "Xmen" logos all around my costume and the base of the backplate of the wings 100% handmade by @mjasmine.design
Our full x-men group at Dragon Con 2024 Phoenix: Panterona Wolverine: Kizuki Cosplay Cyclops: Kaldur Rogue: MJasmine.Design As every good cosplayer, we finished working on these costumes the night before, at the con! Hahaha
Cat tax!! Meet Slippers (top) and Naga (bottom)
item.dc:creator: hanecos

item.title: Returning stolen memes dump part 1
item.description:
This is my first phoneclearing dump. I have way too many memes I like. Please comment if I should do something different and depending on my mood I might listen. Hope you enjoy it!
Cattax! He looks super uncomfortable but he likes to lie down like this. Edit: my 1st post, and my first front page post! Send nudes I guess? I wanna add that I hoped I made someone laugh in these dire times and I will add more dumps. Someone told me a while ago that I never contributed on Imgur and while their tone was awful, they was right tho. So here's me returning what I like about Imgur. Memes.
item.dc:creator: NeedToMakeAPoint

item.title: What Happened Today #74
item.description: Trump’s not ignoring the courts. He’s daring them to stop him. Judges say “reinstate the AP”? Trump says no. Order a deportee returned? He shrugs. One federal judge literally asked if a constitutional crisis is coming. It’s not coming. It’s here. And while the courts stall, Trump’s team is punishing universities, defunding global alliances, and withholding disaster aid to anyone who won’t kneel. This is authoritarianism in action. Call your reps. Call it what it is. Demand it stop. Subscribe free at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/salvador-prisons 2. https://go.govbrief.today/bukele-abregogarcia 3. https://go.govbrief.today/harvard-freeze 4. https://go.govbrief.today/mahdawi-arrest 5. https://go.govbrief.today/pharma-probe 6. https://go.govbrief.today/ap-still-banned 7. https://go.govbrief.today/ps5-increase 8. https://go.govbrief.today/statedept-budget 9. https://go.govbrief.today/fema-washington 10. https://go.govbrief.today/balmer-bail 11. https://go.govbrief.today/multiple-doge 12. https://go.govbrief.today/migrant-entry 13. https://go.govbrief.today/npr-pbs 14. https://go.govbrief.today/hhs-systems 15. https://go.govbrief.today/nm-teslas 16. https://go.govbrief.today/sessions-crisis 17. https://go.govbrief.today/mexican-tomatoes 18. https://go.govbrief.today/survival-guide-angwin
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

I think he needs a hotfix
In this eggonomy this may be the last viable resort..
Yes, we notice <3
This would roll over the greeting card market like google rolled over the internet in the early 2000s
OC, because it gets annoying
@UnlceSlam123 thank you for giving us little breaks from everything else
we need it @vudumommajuju
He just tries to fit in <3
Me too, little one, me too...

item.title: Bottom shelf memes I found in the juggler's dream catcher.
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Do you love memes but hate ads? (ง •̀_•́)ง Check out discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
ᓚᘏᗢ ♡ Join for the games. Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
ᓚᘏᗢ ♡ Potato tax! You can ferd him treats when you catch him love on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Finally Someone is Standing up to him...
item.dc:creator: usernametakenisthestoryofmylife

item.title: Never Forget The Greatest Retraction Ever
item.description:
Despite the September 9, 1997 date in the header, this issue actually hit newstands on August 31, 1997 (it's a common practice to postdate periodicals).
Another exciting thing that happened that day is that Lady Di was killed in a violent car crash
Leading to the greatest print retraction of our lifetimes
Bonus Points: the shameless "The Crash - what *really* happened" article. She was fleeing from the paparazzi you bloodsucking soulless cunts.
item.dc:creator: Jonson71

Son of a bitch, I'm in!

item.title: As if LLMs aren't bad enough, why is everyone trying to force low-tier ones on us?!
item.description:
You know, this:
Ryan George complained about Google on June 13th, 2022 and again on March 3rd, 2025 because it managed to get even worse! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NT7_SxJ3oSI https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4wCGVrAn4qYEdit! Ryan released a video today (on the ScreenRant channel) fact-checking ChatGPT! Thanks PhoenixFalling! :) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Iz-t4XFYjR4 He didn't seem to like the "People also ask" section because it is another thing through which he needs to scroll to find his actual result, but sometimes I found those useful.
I don't want AI Overview for my own questions! AI Overview for random strangers' questions is right out!
item.dc:creator: MenloPart

item.title: Harvard Denies Trump Administration Demands
item.description:
The Letter
Seems like the administration is trying to install one of these in every University. Sad that Columbia University has already caved to the administration. https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/us/federal-agencies-say-columbia-university-s-new-policies-a-positive-first-step-toward-regaining-aid/ar-AA1BwuM5 I'm sure they received the same exact letter. Good to see Harvard taking a stance.
item.dc:creator: HotSauceNCereal

item.title: Where is Kilmar Abrego Garcia?
item.description: This needs to be top of people's minds. The Republican administration has not even provided proof of life while saying they will not comply with the supreme Court to get him back. They want us to ignore this and forget but, this is only the beginning. What's to stop them from sending citizens at this point? Call your reps and demand the safe return of this man!
item.dc:creator: Ristari

item.title: A little quality time with Meadow
item.description: Meadow was being super cute and I felt the need to spend some time with her. Look at that little yawn. Oh my god I LOVE HER
